summary: Completed testing of Course unlock_type feature, CourseEditor, and Login demo buttons. All new features working correctly: 1) Login page shows only Teacher/Member demo buttons (no Admin), 2) CourseWizard has 3 steps (Details→Settings→Review) with Sequential/Scheduled unlock mode, 3) Course detail page shows unlock type badge, 4) CourseEditor modal allows cover upload and unlock mode toggle, 5) Course changes persist correctly, 6) Scheduled unlock mode locks/unlocks lessons based on date.
passed_tests: Login page shows Teacher and Member demo buttons
Login page does NOT show Admin demo button (confirmed removed)
Teacher login works with teacher@theroom.com / teacher123
Member login works with member@theroom.com / member123
Admin demo account doesn't exist (401 on login)
Course creation with default sequential unlock_type
Course creation with explicit sequential unlock_type
Course creation with scheduled unlock_type
Course update unlock_type from sequential to scheduled
Course update title and description
Scheduled lesson with past date is unlocked for members
Scheduled lesson with future date is locked for members
Scheduled lesson with today's date is unlocked
Teachers always see all lessons as unlocked
Cover upload endpoint exists (POST /api/courses/{id}/cover)
Cover image upload with PNG works
Course API accepts unlock_type in request body
CourseWizard opens with 3 steps: Course Details, Settings, Review
CourseWizard Settings step shows Sequential and Scheduled options
CourseWizard Review step shows selected unlock mode
Course detail page shows unlock type badge (Sequential/Scheduled icon)
Course detail page has Settings/Edit button for teachers
CourseEditor modal opens with Edit Course title
CourseEditor shows cover image upload option
CourseEditor shows Sequential/Scheduled unlock mode toggle
CourseEditor Save Changes button works
Course changes persist after save (unlock type updates)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed courses during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Course unlock_type feature fully implemented. Courses can be created with 'sequential' (default) or 'scheduled' unlock mode. Sequential: lessons unlock one by one after completing previous. Scheduled: lessons unlock based on their lesson_date. CourseEditor allows editing title, description, cover image (upload or URL), unlock_type, and published status. Admin demo user has been removed from the system.
